metadata.description: SideQuest - ADHD-friendly Claude Code plugins for developers who thrive on hyperfocus. Tools that work with your brain, not against it.

plugins.name: nvcc
plugins.description: Core productivity commands, specialized agents, and custom skills for dotfiles management, shell workflows, HyperFlow keyboard orchestration, and SuperWhisper voice dictation.

plugins.name: atuin
plugins.description: Atuin shell history integration - search, capture, and manage bash command history with AI. Never lose a command again.

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Git intelligence for Claude Code - session context, commit history, smart commits with Conventional Commits. Includes MCP server, SessionStart/PreCompact hooks, and slash commands.

plugins.name: bun-runner
plugins.description: Smart test runner and linter MCP server. Run tests and lint with structured, token-efficient output. Filters out passing tests and verbose logs, focusing agents on failures.

plugins.name: validate-plugin
plugins.description: Automatically validates plugin files after edits. Catches invalid marketplace.json, plugin.json, and hooks.json before they cause problems.

plugins.name: para-brain
plugins.description: Ultimate PARA method and Building a Second Brain plugin for Obsidian. Includes CODE methodology (Capture, Organize, Distill, Express), Progressive Summarization, and complete note management workflows with MCP Obsidian integration.

plugins.name: claude-code-docs
plugins.description: Claude Code documentation - auto-updating local docs with search skill. Provides offline access to official documentation with automated fetching, indexing, and intelligent search.

plugins.name: claude-code-claude-md
plugins.description: CLAUDE.md manager for creating and optimizing memory files across the hierarchical cascade system. Includes templates for user/project/module levels, token optimization strategies, and comprehensive best practices.

plugins.name: plugin-template
plugins.description: Generate new plugin scaffolds with configurable components. Create commands, MCP servers, hooks, and skills following SideQuest marketplace patterns. TDD-tested generator with comprehensive templates.

plugins.name: mcp-manager
plugins.description: Manage MCP servers - add, list, enable, and disable without removing configurations.
